author: Xbox
text:
CAPTAIN TSUBASA 2: WORLD FIGHTERS - Story Trailer
Our road to the top of the world starts here! 🔥⚽ 
 
CAPTAIN TSUBASA 2: WORLD FIGHTERS available on August 28th, 2026! 

Standard Edition Pre-Order: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/captain-tsubasa-2-world-fighters-pre-order/9MZPZL58B20R
Deluxe Edition Pre-Order: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/captain-tsubasa-2-world-fighters-deluxe-edition-pre-order/9P8Z6ZWP3G5B
Ultimate Edition Pre-Order: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/captain-tsubasa-2-world-fighters-ultimate-edition-pre-order/9NTMG5JXR9TH
 
#CaptainTsubasa #WorldFighters

author: Xbox
text:
LEGO® Batman™: Legacy of the Dark Knight – Official Deluxe Edition Trailer
Alfred, it’s time to open the Deluxe wing of the Batcave. 

Pre-order the Deluxe Edition of #LEGOBatmanGame and play early on May 19!  
 
Purchase Now: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9pfkp8z66g1j   

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is a brand-new open world action adventure video game that invites players to embark on Bruce Wayne’s epic journey to become the hero of Gotham City, inspired by decades of Batman films, television, comic books, and games, and jam-packed with Batman nostalgia, DC lore, and TT Games’ signature brand of fun-filled LEGO humor.   

#LegacyoftheDarkKnight #LEGOBatman #DC #Batman

author: Xbox
text:
Call of the Elder Gods Launch Trailer
Journey to the far corners of the Earth and unearth ancient horrors in this Lovecraftian narrative puzzle adventure and sequel to 2020’s critically acclaimed Call of the Sea. Out now Xbox Series X|S, and available day one on Xbox Game Pass!

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/call-of-the-elder-gods/9pf697tg7pp7

author: Xbox
text:
NITRO GEN OMEGA - Launch Trailer
A sandbox tactical RPG of steel, fire, friendship, and shonen anime. Assemble your crew, customize your Mech, and lead them in cinematic turn-based battles through a world ruled by rogue AI. The bonds you forge will decide who survives!

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/nitro-gen-omega/9p12lmnlrnr7

author: Xbox
text:
Directive 8020 - Xbox Series Launch Trailer
DIRECTIVE 8020 IS OUT NOW ON XBOX SERIES X|S!
Get your hands on the sci-fi horror experience now: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/directive-8020-pre-order/9N1NV0W95FS2/0017

Your mission is clear: save humanity.
Your choices shape their destiny.
And remember…  in space, death takes many forms.

From the creators of UNTIL DAWN and THE QUARRY – Directive 8020 is an all-new cinematic sci-fi horror adventure that blends intense survival gameplay with meaningful choices and a branching storyline. 

SUBSCRIBE TO XBOX: https://xbx.lv/2EEjmaR

author: Xbox
text:
Deadzone Rogue 2 | Xbox Series X|S Announcement Trailer
Fight as Talon 13-10 in this FPS roguelite adventure set on a fallen Earth. Combine weapons, augments, and elements to forge devastating builds, and blast through Monarch’s endless machines. Grow stronger each run, solo or with friends.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/deadzone-rogue-2/9N38H5DK7K11/0010

text:
Froggy Hates Snow Launch Trailer
You are Froggy, a determined survivor in a hostile, snowy desert. Dig pathways through the snow, battle eerie creatures, and adapt in a world where warmth is survival and the freezing temperatures aren’t the only thing that can kill!
